channel.title: Financial Planning for Couples on Econumo
channel.description: Recent content in Financial Planning for Couples on Econumo

item.title: How to Merge Finances After Marriage A Practical Guide
item.description: Alright, let’s talk about merging your finances after you get married. It’s about so much more than just combining numbers in a spreadsheet. At its heart, this is about building trust and learning to work as a team, starting with that very first conversation about money. Starting the Money Conversation After Marriage # Before you even think about opening a joint account or drafting a budget, the real work begins with a simple talk.
